Privacy Policy

This page explains how Chicken Fillet collects, uses, and protects your information.

Information Collection

When you send a message through the contact form, we collect your name, email address, and message content. This information is only used to respond to your inquiry and will not be used for other purposes.

Information Usage

The information we collect is only used to communicate with you. We will not sell, rent, or share your information with third parties unless required by law.

Data Security

We take reasonable technical measures to protect your information from unauthorized access, use, or disclosure.

Cookies

This website does not use cookies or similar tracking technologies.

Policy Updates

We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Updated policies will be posted on this page. Please check periodically.

Contact Us

If you have any questions about this privacy policy, please contact us through the contact page.

Chicken FilletDesigner of Minimal Desktop Tools
